scenario.title: The Hidden Opportunity
scenario.narrative: Siobhán Kelly scores Low priority on the overall wealth index — exactly the kind of client a traditional system would never call. But the Aurum wealth engine tells a different story: €8,500 in monthly income, perfect credit across two loans, and only €60,500 in investable assets at 43. Nearly €5,000 a month is accumulating in a current account. The engine surfaces a High-urgency FCF conversion signal hidden inside a Low-priority profile. This is the wealth manager's window.

recommendations.suggestion: Initiate an investment portfolio conversation — the client has strong cash flow that is not yet being deployed into wealth-building assets.
recommendations.reason: Free cash flow of €4,975/month with a low asset base (Prosperity score: 0/100) is the classic early-engagement signal. Act now before this capital drifts to competitors.
recommendations.product_hint: Managed investment fund / regular investment plan

recommendations.suggestion: Present the cost of inaction — €1,492/year in real purchasing power is being eroded on idle cash.
recommendations.reason: At current inflation, leaving monthly free cash flow uninvested costs ~€1,492 per year in real terms. This is a concrete number to open the investment conversation with the client.
recommendations.product_hint: Regular investment plan / money market fund

recommendations.suggestion: Develop an urgent asset accumulation plan — current prosperity position is critically low relative to life stage.
recommendations.reason: Prosperity score of 0/100 (total assets: €60,500) is very low. Without intervention, this client will face significant wealth shortfall at retirement.

recommendations.suggestion: Begin the investment conversation — solvency is stable enough to support a modest regular investment alongside existing debt commitments.
recommendations.reason: Stable solvency (55/100) in the mid-career stage with low prosperity (0/100) means the client is managing debt well but not yet building wealth. A small regular investment now compounds significantly by retirement.
recommendations.product_hint: Regular savings plan / low-cost index fund

recommendations.suggestion: Debt management is healthy — focus conversation on prosperity building rather than credit products.
recommendations.reason: All active loans are in good standing. Good credit is the baseline for a wealth client, not a differentiator. Direct attention to where the real opportunity is: idle capital and prosperity gap.
